description: Striker's shoulder is level with the last defender as the ball is played forward by a teammate from midfield; no other defender is closer to the goal line.
ground_truth: Not Offside (level = onside)

description: Striker's foot is clearly ahead of the last defender's torso when the through-ball is played; striker runs onto it and scores.
ground_truth: Offside - goal disallowed

description: Player in an offside position when the ball is played receives it but is not interfering with play, standing in their own half near the touchline far from the action.
ground_truth: Not Offside - not involved in active play

description: Very tight offside call decided by a margin of a few centimeters using semi-automated offside technology lines, attacker's armpit marginally ahead of defender's shoulder.
ground_truth: Offside (technology-confirmed, armpit/shoulder daylight rule)

description: Attacker is in an offside position when the ball is played, but a defender deliberately plays the ball before it reaches the attacker, resetting the offside trap.
ground_truth: Not Offside - deliberate play by defender resets the position

description: Attacker is in an onside position when the ball is played, then moves into an offside position before the ball arrives and scores.
ground_truth: Not Offside - position at the moment the ball is played is what counts

description: Goalkeeper rushes out, leaving no outfield defender near the goal line. Attacker is ahead of all outfield players but the goalkeeper is still closer to the goal line.
ground_truth: Not Offside - goalkeeper counts as a defender

description: Defender's arm is away from the body in a non-natural position and the ball strikes it inside the penalty box while attempting to block a cross.
ground_truth: Penalty - handball

description: Ball strikes a defender's arm at close range while the arm is tucked tight to the body during a goalmouth scramble.
ground_truth: No Penalty - ball-to-hand, arm in natural position

description: Attacking player's hand makes clear contact with the ball before it goes into the net.
ground_truth: Goal Disallowed - handball by attacker

description: Defender uses their arm to deliberately control the ball on the edge of the penalty area, but the foul is outside the box by a few centimetres.
ground_truth: No Penalty - foul outside the penalty area, free kick only

description: Ball rebounds off an attacker's own arm from close range before falling to a teammate who scores; the attacker did not intentionally direct the ball.
ground_truth: Goal Disallowed - accidental handball by an attacker in the build-up counts under current IFAB rules

description: Defender makes clear contact on the attacker's standing leg before touching the ball during a tackle inside the box, attacker through on goal with no covering defender.
ground_truth: Penalty + Red Card (DOGSO)

description: Attacker goes down inside the box after minimal contact from a defender's trailing leg, with the attacker already off balance before contact.
ground_truth: No Penalty - simulation/insufficient contact

description: Goalkeeper collides with an onrushing attacker inside the box after the keeper has already gathered the ball cleanly.
ground_truth: Penalty - careless/reckless challenge by goalkeeper after gaining control

description: Defender inside the box trips an attacker with a covering teammate nearby. The attacker was through on goal but there was one other defender who could have intercepted.
ground_truth: Penalty - foul in the box; no Red Card as a covering defender was present (DOGSO criteria not fully met)

description: Attacker cuts into the box and is caught by a sliding tackle that takes the ball cleanly; the attacker falls over the defender's outstretched leg.
ground_truth: No Penalty - ball played first, fair challenge

description: Defender, last player back, deliberately handles the ball on the goal line to stop it crossing into the net.
ground_truth: Red Card (DOGSO - handball denying a goal) + Penalty

description: Player lunges into a tackle with excessive force, studs up, making contact above the ankle with the opponent's standing leg, ball not in playing distance.
ground_truth: Red Card - serious foul play

description: Two players jostle off the ball away from play after a whistle, one shoves the other in the chest with both hands, no punches thrown.
ground_truth: Yellow Card - unsporting behavior/no excessive force

description: Player headbutts an opponent off the ball in clear sight of the assistant referee but the referee did not see it.
ground_truth: Red Card - violent conduct, reviewable by VAR as a missed incident

description: Goalkeeper picks up a deliberate back-pass played with the foot by a teammate inside their own penalty area.
ground_truth: Indirect free kick to the opposing team inside the penalty area - deliberate back-pass handled

description: Goalkeeper handles the ball outside the penalty area after rushing out to clear; the ball was clearly outside the box when caught.
ground_truth: Red Card - deliberate handball outside the box denying an obvious goal-scoring opportunity

description: VAR reviews a potential penalty for a foul that looked clear in real time, but multiple angles show the defender got the ball cleanly before any contact with the attacker.
ground_truth: VAR Review - No Clear Error, original on-field decision of no penalty stands

description: Referee awards a penalty after a foul that occurred just outside the penalty area; VAR review confirms the contact point was outside the box.
ground_truth: No Penalty - foul location outside the area, award a direct free kick instead
